hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); SESSION=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; STATUS=$(git status --porcelain "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then TOUCHED="/tmp/claude-${SESSION}-touched"; if [ -n "$SESSION" ] && grep -qxF "$FILE" "$TOUCHED" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"⚠ BLOCKED: %s has uncommitted changes from another session — run: git diff %s to review, then stash or commit before editing here."}' "$BASENAME" "$BASENAME"; exit 2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); SESSION=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); if [ -n "$SESSION" ] && [ -n "$FILE" ]; then echo "$FILE" >> "/tmp/claude-${SESSION}-touched"; fi
